nodes.title: Set Hazards
nodes.description: Given a list of PiersHazardConfig objects, when SetHazards() is called, then the hazard list is stored and the internal turn counter resets to 0.

nodes.title: Hazard Interval
nodes.description: Given hazards are configured with IntervalTurns, when OnTurnChanged fires, then hazard only triggers when (turnCount % IntervalTurns == 0). Otherwise no effect.

nodes.title: Hazard Player Only
nodes.description: Given it is an enemy's turn, when OnTurnChanged fires, then no hazards are applied. Hazards only trigger when IsPlayerTurn() returns true.

nodes.title: Exhaustion Hazard
nodes.description: Given an Exhaustion hazard is active and triggers, then all alive player characters lose (Strength * 5) stamina via ConsumeStamina.

nodes.title: Poverty Hazard
nodes.description: Given a Poverty hazard is active and triggers, then all alive player characters with CurrentKynde >= 1 lose Strength Kynde via ConsumeKynde.

nodes.title: Labor Hazard
nodes.description: Given a Labor hazard is active and triggers, then all alive player characters lose (Strength * 3) stamina via ConsumeStamina.

nodes.title: Hunger Hazard
nodes.description: Given a Hunger hazard is active and triggers, then all alive player characters receive 1 Hunger stack with 8-second duration via ApplyHunger(1, 8f).
